$comment: Quick-reference index of this ratchet flows (id + summary + entry + node count). Generated by tools/index_flows.ps1 - re-run after adding or changing a flow. The engine discovers flows by scanning each flow folder chain.json; this file is for fast human/agent reference.

flows.summary: Add a new C++ file/class/feature to the active workspace project; rebuild the whole project to verify, repair up to twice, and record it.
Generate one composed C++ unit against the accumulated project, build the whole project with cl, repair twice, register.
Answer a C++ / Win32 / MSVC question grounded in the knowledge bases (cppref, cppdocs, win32, patterns, guidelines, errors); cite the APIs involved, say plainly when something is not covered.

Compose a C++ program from a dir of specs: plan the build order, generate each unit (header-only components + a main.cpp entry) in dependency order against the accumulated project, then build with cl.
Generate C++ (C++17, MSVC) for a focused task: plan the APIs, ground on cppreference, compile-check with cl, repair up to twice.
Refactor a function/class, fix a bug, or apply a change to an existing C++ file in the active workspace; rebuild the whole project to verify and repair up to twice.
